component.name: Avatar
component.description: Display a user or entity image with a text/icon fallback.

useCases: User profile pictures in headers or sidebars
Participant lists in comments or chat
Author attribution on cards or articles

commonPatterns.name: image-with-fallback
commonPatterns.description: Avatar image that falls back to initials when the image fails to load

commonPatterns.name: initials-only
commonPatterns.description: Fallback-only avatar for users without a profile image

commonPatterns.name: avatar-group
commonPatterns.description: Stacked overlapping avatars for a group of users

antiPatterns.reason: If the image fails to load the avatar renders empty, creating a broken visual
antiPatterns.alternative: Always include AvatarFallback with initials or a placeholder icon

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Avatar for decorative icons or logos
antiPatterns.reason: Avatar is semantically tied to people/entities and includes fallback logic for images
antiPatterns.alternative: Use an img tag or Icon component for non-person imagery

slots.AvatarImage: The user image (renders inside the root)
slots.AvatarFallback: Fallback content shown while image loads or on error

interactions.imageLoad: AvatarImage renders once the src loads successfully
interactions.imageError: AvatarFallback is displayed when the image fails

responsive.desktop: Can be larger (size-10, size-12) in profile views

accessibility.screenReader: Reads the alt text from AvatarImage; fallback text is visible but alt is preferred

rules: Always include AvatarFallback as a sibling of AvatarImage
Provide meaningful alt text on AvatarImage
Size is controlled via className on the root Avatar (default size-8)

aiHints.context: Use for any user or entity representation. Always pair AvatarImage with AvatarFallback. Default size is 32px (size-8); resize via className on the root.
